expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus and ties it to the required-before-ship gating mechanism in phase5b: "Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit `[ANALOG-GATE]` entries" and "This is the mechanism by which historical analogs become required-before-ship gates". It further evaluates that this was "Not demonstrated" due to missing artifacts, but the expectation asks for explicit coverage of the case focus, which is present.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is framed and evaluated specifically against phase5b throughout: title "phase5b", section "What phase5b is required to enforce", and the determination is made based on missing "Phase 5b artifacts" (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, phase5b draft). This demonstrates alignment to the phase5b primary phase, even though the benchmark outcome is FAIL.
